parameters.query: =INSERT INTO n8n_users (email, password_hash, salt, token, token_expires) VALUES ('{{ $json.email }}', '{{ $json.hash }}', '{{ $json.salt }}', '{{ $json.token }}', NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days') ON CONFLICT (email) DO NOTHING RETURNING id::text AS id, email, token;
=SELECT id::text AS id, email, password_hash, salt FROM n8n_users WHERE email='{{ $json.email }}' LIMIT 1;
=UPDATE n8n_users SET token='{{ $json.token }}', token_expires=NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days' WHERE id='{{ $json.id }}' AND {{ $json.ok }};
